title: calceolaria × guttata
intro: Calceolaria × guttata, also known as the Pocketbook or Slipper Flower, is a hybrid plant species in the Calceolaria genus. This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Calceolaria × guttata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Calceolaria × guttata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which allow for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
